Sandee's Fruit Compote

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

16 oz bag frozen sweetened, sliced strawberries, with juice 2 Fugi or Gala apples, peeled & chunked 2 D’Anjou Pears, peeled & chunked 1 sm can mandarin oranges, drained lots of bananas (5-6), to taste

Directions

Thaw strawberries in fridge over night. Combine the rest in the a.m. and serve with Belgian waffles and Cool Whip.
